heading: Thursday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Rain likely; and possibly heavy at times, especially in New Hampshire, and in central and northern Vermont. Patchy fog. Lows in the mid to upper 40s, with some lower 40s northeast and in the Adirondacks. Northeast winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Morning showers likely east of the Greens, chance west; then widely scattered in the afternoon, mainly over high terrain. Some afternoon clearing west of the Greens. Highs in the low to mid 60s, with some upper 50s in New Hampshire. Northeast winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Friday Night
text: Chance of an evening shower in the northern mountains, otherwise gradual clearing overnight. Areas of valley fog. Lows in the low to mid 40s. Light and variable winds.
